name: Christmas Fruit Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Mixed dark and light raisins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix flour, baking powder, and salt together in a bowl.
3. Rub in the margarine until the mixture resembles fine breadcrumbs.
4. Add fruit, nuts, orange rind, carrots, and spices; mix well.
5. Dissolve sweetener in eggs and beat into the dry ingredients with enough orange juice to form a soft dough.
6. Pour the batter into an 8-inch round or 7x7-inch nonstick cake pan.
7. Bake for 45-60 minutes (or use a larger pan and reduce cooking time) until firm to the touch and a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool in the pan.
9. Turn the cake upside down, making a few holes with a toothpick.
10. Spoon any leftover orange juice and alcohol over the top if used.
11. Store in an airtight container.
12. Suggested icing: made with apples and cottage cheese.
(Note: 12 slices each containing 180 calories, 20 grams (2 units) of carbohydrate (2 bread/starch exchanges), 4 grams fiber, 5 grams protein, 9 grams fat.)
